---
description: Conventions for action definition files
applyTo: "**/actions/*.md"
---

# Action File Conventions

When creating or editing action files:

- Use verb-noun naming: `create-feature.md`, `review-code.md`, `assess-level.md`
- Begin with a clear one-line purpose statement
- Include prerequisite checks or conditions before the main steps
- Structure steps as a numbered sequence the agent can follow
- Reference relevant standards using relative paths
- End with validation criteria or a success condition
- Keep each action focused on a single responsibility
